target: One exam can contain Practicing, Consulting sau both. Each candidat has primary și secondary examinator.
notes: Protected term(s): Practicing, Consulting, primary, secondary. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.
Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Load or save the current Centre Setup through the backend. Returned Candidate QR and Examiner QR links are shown in the QR access pack below.
cs: Načtěte nebo uložte aktuální Centre Setup přes backend. Vrácené Candidate QR a Examiner QR odkazy se zobrazí níže v QR access packu.
target: Încarcă sau salvează current Centre Setup through backend. Returned Candidate QR și Examiner QR linkuri sunt afișați in QR pachet de acces below.
notes: Protected term(s): Candidate, Examiner, Centre, Centre Setup, Candidate QR, Examiner QR. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Click Save Centre Setup to persist roster, examiners, assignments, variants, and imported tests.
cs: Kliknutím na Save Centre Setup uložíte roster, zkoušející, přiřazení, varianty a importované testy.
target: Click salvează Centre Setup la persist roster, examinatori, assignments, variante, și importat tests.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

cs: Tato session používá backend-loaded pilot data.
target: Acest sesiune uses backend-loaded pilot data.
notes: Protected term(s): backend-loaded pilot data. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: This session uses demo fallback data for testing only. Load Centre Setup to use backend-loaded pilot data.
cs: Tato session používá demo fallback data pouze pro testování. Načtením Centre Setup použijete backend-loaded pilot data.
target: Acest sesiune uses demo fallback data pentru testare Doar. încarcă Centre Setup la use backend-loaded pilot data.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, backend-loaded pilot data, demo fallback data, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Save Centre Setup after changing roster, examiners, assignments, or imported tests.
cs: Po změně rosteru, zkoušejících, přiřazení nebo importovaných testů uložte Centre Setup.
target: salvează Centre Setup după changing roster, examinatori, assignments, sau importat tests.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.
Protected term(s): backend-loaded pilot data. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

cs: Kopírování není dostupné. Označte a ručně zkopírujte QR odkaz: {label}.
target: Copy indisponibil. Select și copy {label} link QR manually.
notes: Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {label}.

en: Import CSV or JSON package with real tests. The selected variant is then shown to candidates.
cs: Importujte CSV nebo JSON balíček se skutečnými testy. Vybraná varianta se poté zobrazí kandidátům.
target: Importa CSV sau JSON pachet cu reale tests. selectat varianta este then afisat la candidati.
notes: Target intentionally blank for reviewer translation.
Target intentionally blank for reviewer translation.

en: CSV columns: variantCode, level, language, questionId, type, points, text, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctAnswer. JSON format: { "variants": [...], "questions": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.
cs: CSV sloupce: variantCode, level, language, questionId, type, points, text, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctAnswer. JSON formát: { "variants": [...], "questions": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.
target: CSV columns: variantCode, level, language, questionId, type, points, text, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctAnswer. JSON format: { "variants": [...], "questions": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.
notes: Protected term(s): correctAnswer, variantCode, questionId, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, VARIANT_CODE. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review. Import/export helper context only; preserve CSV/JSON field names exactly and do not expose correctAnswer outside this context.
Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {variants}, {questions}.

en: Open the Centre portal with a valid Centre QR session, then try again.
cs: Otevřete portál Centra pomocí platné Centre QR session a zkuste to znovu.
target: Deschide Centre portal cu un valid Centre QR sesiune, then try again.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre QR. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Loaded Centre Setup for exam event {event}.
cs: Centre Setup načten pro zkušební událost {event}.
target: Încărcat Centre Setup pentru exam event {event}.
notes: Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {event}. Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Saved Centre Setup for exam event {event}.
cs: Centre Setup uložen pro zkušební událost {event}.
target: Salvat Centre Setup pentru exam event {event}.
notes: Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {event}. Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Centre Setup could not be loaded. Check the session and try again.
cs: Centre Setup se nepodařilo načíst. Zkontrolujte session a zkuste to znovu.
target: Centre Setup could not be încărcat. Check sesiune și try again.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

en: Centre Setup could not be saved. Check the Centre session and try again.
cs: Centre Setup se nepodařilo uložit. Zkontrolujte Centre session a zkuste to znovu.
target: Centre Setup could not be salvat. Check Centre sesiune și try again.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre Setup. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.

cs: Před stažením Audit Package otevřete portál Centra pomocí platné Centre QR session.
target: Deschide Centre portal cu un valid Centre QR sesiune înainte de downloading Audit pachet.
notes: Protected term(s): Centre, Centre QR. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.
Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {variants}, {questions}.

cs: Import testu selhal: soubor se nepodařilo přečíst.

notes: Target intentionally blank for reviewer translation.
Preserve placeholder(s) exactly: {variants}, {questions}.

en: Open this portal with a valid QR session before loading the evaluation preview.
cs: Před načtením náhledu vyhodnocení otevřete tento portál pomocí platné QR session.
target: Deschide Acest portal cu un valid QR sesiune înainte de loading Previzualizare evaluare.
notes: Target intentionally blank for reviewer translation.

en: Evaluation preview is unavailable. Reopen the Examiner QR session and try again.
cs: Náhled vyhodnocení není dostupný. Znovu otevřete Examiner QR session a zkuste to znovu.
target: Previzualizare evaluare este indisponibil. Reopen Examiner QR sesiune și try again.
notes: Protected term(s): Examiner, Examiner QR. Do not translate unless explicitly approved during review.
